title: Stock Alert
description: Stock Alert v1 contract for SKU + warehouse stock warning levels, guard evidence, and optional Production Demand linkage.
$comment: Sources: Muc canh bao ton kho san pham, PACK-03 Stock Alert, and OD-FGSA-001..015 owner approvals.

warehouse_id.description: Warehouse scope for FGSA policy/evaluation. Product derives from SKU; channel scope is deferred.

warehouse_location_id.description: Optional location/bin snapshot for evidence and trace only.

alert_reason.description: Reason/evaluation label captured by the stock-alert evaluator.

available_stock_breakdown.description: Sellable-eligible availability evidence. Must exclude reserved/allocation/hold/recall/sale-lock/quality-hold/not-sellable quantities when populated.

guard_block_reasons.description: Fail-closed sellable guard blockers such as recall, sale-lock, quality hold, not-sellable, or zero stock.

risk_calculation.description: Composite STOCKOUT_RISK evidence, including fixed floor and lead-time coverage when available.

lead_time_days.description: Lead time from owner-approved SKU + warehouse planning policy, not service hardcode.

coverage_days.description: Coverage-days result used by composite risk evaluation when available.

source_stock_balance_id.description: Optional source balance/projection record used as evaluation evidence.

source_ledger_entry_id.description: Optional last source ledger entry used as evaluation evidence.

recommended_action.description: Recommended action from stock alert policy, e.g. create warning, create Production Demand, or activate Stock/Sellable Guard.

demand_id.description: Production Demand created from the alert when applicable.
